hyperedges.label: Retrieval Pipeline: Exact Pre-pass + Fuse Fuzzy + Lexical Recall + RRF Fusion
Adaptive Learning Loop: Click → Habit Store → Boost → Suggestion
Query Enrichment: Abbrev Expand → Typo Correct → Intent + Temporal + Course Scope
DropBridge V2 Lifecycle: bootstrap → register device → alarm → offscreen → poll → process upload
LMS Scan → chrome.storage indexedContent → Supabase sync flow
Auth state change → persist snapshot → start/stop DropBridge loop → auto-sync
Master Render Pipeline: renderAll dispatches all sub-renderers
Dark Mode Reactive Observers: system, scheduled, and storage watchers all trigger renderAll
White Island Fix Chain: startDarkFixer → fixWhiteIslands → markComputedLightSurfaces → DARK_SURFACE_CLASS
PDF Send Pipeline – collectPdfCandidates → refreshLectraPdfContext (content) / sendPdfToLectra (slash) → background sendPdfToLectra action
Dual Overlay Activation – Cmd+K iframe overlay (content.js) and '/' shadow DOM overlay (slash-overlay.js) share mutual-exclusion guard
Auto-Index SPA Watcher – SPA route detection triggers maybeAutoIndexPdf, shares PDF URL resolution with collectPdfCandidates
Academic Tools Modal Feature Pattern (modal host + storage + open* functions)
PDF Viewer Button Lifecycle (create, drag, click, settings toggle)
Temporal Lab Sibling Expansion Pipeline (abbreviation expand, course hints, lab number extraction, results expand)
Dual-Source RAG Prompt Pipeline: scrapeActiveTab + retrieveLocalContext → compileRAGPrompt → handleSubmit
Skin Theme Application Pipeline: CanvascopeSkinThemes → resolveTokens → renderDocViewerStyles / renderParentStyles
Shared Urgency Window Classification: radar classifyWindow, rag-core getUpcomingItems, reminders ITEM_THRESHOLDS all bucket tasks by temporal proximity
Dual-Mode AI Streaming Pattern (Nano local + Supabase cloud fallback)
Dual-Source RAG Retrieval Flow (page scrape + local DB)
Per-User JSON Blob Cross-Device Sync Tables
DropBridge v2 Upload Pipeline (edge fn + drops bucket + uploads table + APNs)
Search Benchmark Pipeline (corpus + harness + runner)
Search Habits Backend Schema (events + patterns + RLS)
Adaptive Search Backend Pipeline (event → pattern → suggestion)
DropBridge v2 Upload Claim + Wake + Auth Flow
Hybrid Retrieval via SemanticMatcher (vectorize + cosineSimilarity + rrfMerge)
DropBridge Upload Lifecycle (upload-file → list-pending → update-upload-status-v2)
DropBridge Device Registration + Auth Flow (register-device-v2, clientKind guard, push token)
MV3 Extension Entry Points (content scripts, background worker, side panel)
DropBridge Device Auth Flow: Migration Schema + Shared Auth Helper + Edge Functions
Slash Command i18n Surface: EN + ES locale files localizing the slash overlay UI
Release Test Pipeline: run-release-tests orchestrates node regressions including skin-themes test
DropBridge v2 schema evolution: two migrations incrementally extend devices+uploads tables
CI → npm test → test:release orchestration chain
Service worker loads supabase.js + background.js + reminders.js + extras as a unified runtime

nodes.label: v8 Implementation Plan — Dual-Source RAG Context Pipeline
nodes.rationale: The v8 plan chose a dual-source retrieval design (active-page DOM scrape + local chrome.storage keyword scorer) rather than a single-source approach because neither source alone is sufficient: the active page lacks historical study items, while local storage has no real-time page content. Running both in parallel via Promise.all keeps latency minimal. The retrieval is kept 100% on-device (zero external calls) to guarantee student privacy. Cloud AI (Supabase Gemini proxy) is a fallback only when on-device Gemini Nano is unavailable, preserving the local-first privacy contract. The Phase 2.1 patch added context-aware schedule-intent detection because pure keyword matching silently failed for generic queries like 'what do I need to do?' — the fix returns a due-date-sorted agenda fallback when schedule intent is detected but no keyword matches exist, ensuring the AI companion is actually useful for task management.
nodes.norm_label: v8 implementation plan — dual-source rag context pipeline

nodes.label: RAG Pipeline Architecture (sidepanel → RAGCore → AI)
nodes.rationale: The sequenceDiagram shows the deliberate choice to run page scraping and local DB retrieval in parallel (par/and) to minimize user-perceived latency before AI response streaming begins.

nodes.label: Schedule-Intent Context-Aware Fallback
nodes.rationale: Keyword-only retrieval silently failed for natural-language schedule queries. The fix introduces hasScheduleIntent() as a secondary routing layer: when intent is detected but no lexical match exists, RAGCore falls back to surfacing the upcoming to-do/assignment agenda sorted by due date. Keyword precision still wins when a strong match exists, preventing the fallback from polluting precise lookups.

nodes.label: /todo Slash Command Silent Breakage Fix
nodes.rationale: The /todo list mode broke silently because buildCommandResults only accepts arrays but cmdTodo's list branch returned a Promise. The fix makes the list branch read synchronously from preloaded ctx.customTodos rather than issuing an async storage call, eliminating the Promise-vs-array type mismatch.

nodes.label: Security Threat Model
nodes.rationale: XSS mitigated by strict CSP + no inline scripts; unauthorized data access mitigated by host scoping + domain validation + Supabase RLS; PDF abuse mitigated by signature checks + 25 MB cap + MIME constraints

nodes.label: Extension Permission Rationale
nodes.rationale: Least-privilege manifest permissions: storage, activeTab, tabs, alarms, scripting, identity, downloads — each scoped to a specific workflow; host permissions limited to LMS and Supabase domains

nodes.label: Lectra Sync Security Controls
nodes.rationale: Send to Lectra requires explicit user action, authenticated session, PDF signature validation, 25 MB limit, RLS-restricted storage bucket, and private DropBridge realtime wake topic authorization

nodes.label: GitHub Actions 30-Minute Google Form Sync
nodes.rationale: Pulls Google Form bug reports into docs/bug-reports/google-form-responses.json via scheduled GitHub Actions workflow every 30 minutes, decoupling live form data from repo-tracked JSON without manual intervention.

nodes.label: Google Cloud Service Account Auth for Sheet Access
nodes.rationale: Requires a service account with viewer/editor role on the linked Google Sheet; without explicit share, the sync fails with permission errors.
nodes.norm_label: google cloud service account auth for sheet access

nodes.label: PII Column Exclusion for Public Repos
nodes.rationale: GOOGLE_EXCLUDE_COLUMNS secret allows stripping PII fields before committing responses to the repository, preventing sensitive respondent data from being public.
nodes.norm_label: pii column exclusion for public repos

nodes.label: Current State v7.0.0 Feature Set
nodes.rationale: Describes the live feature set at v7.0.0: custom skin themes, hybrid local search, course-scoped queries, due planner, Google sign-in, Lectra PDF handoff, DropBridge v2, and Canvas sync for Lectra Course Brain.

nodes.label: Phase 1 Completed: Search Quality Foundation
nodes.rationale: Fuzzy search foundation, type/course filtering, search history and ranking weights — completed phase.

nodes.label: Phase 1.5 Completed: Query Relevance v2.0
nodes.rationale: Abbreviation/compact token expansion, suffix/phrase-position boosts, two-pass strict/relaxed query strategy.

nodes.label: Phase 2 Completed: Advanced Ranking and UX v2.1
nodes.rationale: Course-scope detection, RRF hybrid retrieval and diversity balancing, due planner and overlay UX.
nodes.norm_label: phase 2 completed: advanced ranking and ux v2.1

nodes.label: Phase 2.5 Completed: Lectra Bridge v2.2
nodes.rationale: Canvas PDF detection pipeline, floating/popup send actions, PDF validation + DropBridge v2 upload (25 MB), realtime wake subscription + 60s fallback polling, namespaced Course Brain sync rows, bounded Canvas text sync.

nodes.label: Phase 2.6 Completed: Custom Skin Styling & Themes v7.0.0
nodes.rationale: Local styling system with canvas-skin.js and lib/skin-themes.js; dynamic theme injection into active LMS instances; popup-based config with persistence; seamless sync across popup, content script, and service worker.
nodes.norm_label: phase 2.6 completed: custom skin styling & themes v7.0.0

nodes.label: Phase 3 Planned: Content Extraction
nodes.rationale: Upcoming phase: PDF text extraction and indexing, slide/deck parsing improvements, OCR/binary document text extraction beyond bounded Canvas API text.

nodes.label: Phase 4 Planned: Intelligent Retrieval
nodes.rationale: Future phase: semantic embeddings (local or managed), hybrid semantic + lexical ranking, query suggestions and related content.

nodes.label: Roadmap Success Metrics (Latency, Relevance, Reliability)
nodes.rationale: Quantified targets: <50ms search latency, <30s full sync, >80% first-page relevance, >95% Lectra send success on valid PDFs.

hyperedges.label: Retrieval Pipeline: Exact Pre-pass + Fuse Fuzzy + Lexical Recall + RRF Fusion
Adaptive Learning Loop: Click → Habit Store → Boost → Suggestion
Query Enrichment: Abbrev Expand → Typo Correct → Intent + Temporal + Course Scope
DropBridge V2 Lifecycle: bootstrap → register device → alarm → offscreen → poll → process upload
LMS Scan → chrome.storage indexedContent → Supabase sync flow
Auth state change → persist snapshot → start/stop DropBridge loop → auto-sync
Master Render Pipeline: renderAll dispatches all sub-renderers
Dark Mode Reactive Observers: system, scheduled, and storage watchers all trigger renderAll
White Island Fix Chain: startDarkFixer → fixWhiteIslands → markComputedLightSurfaces → DARK_SURFACE_CLASS
PDF Send Pipeline – collectPdfCandidates → refreshLectraPdfContext (content) / sendPdfToLectra (slash) → background sendPdfToLectra action
Dual Overlay Activation – Cmd+K iframe overlay (content.js) and '/' shadow DOM overlay (slash-overlay.js) share mutual-exclusion guard
Auto-Index SPA Watcher – SPA route detection triggers maybeAutoIndexPdf, shares PDF URL resolution with collectPdfCandidates
Academic Tools Modal Feature Pattern (modal host + storage + open* functions)
PDF Viewer Button Lifecycle (create, drag, click, settings toggle)
Temporal Lab Sibling Expansion Pipeline (abbreviation expand, course hints, lab number extraction, results expand)
Dual-Source RAG Prompt Pipeline: scrapeActiveTab + retrieveLocalContext → compileRAGPrompt → handleSubmit
Skin Theme Application Pipeline: CanvascopeSkinThemes → resolveTokens → renderDocViewerStyles / renderParentStyles
Shared Urgency Window Classification: radar classifyWindow, rag-core getUpcomingItems, reminders ITEM_THRESHOLDS all bucket tasks by temporal proximity
Dual-Mode AI Streaming Pattern (Nano local + Supabase cloud fallback)
Dual-Source RAG Retrieval Flow (page scrape + local DB)
Per-User JSON Blob Cross-Device Sync Tables
DropBridge v2 Upload Pipeline (edge fn + drops bucket + uploads table + APNs)
Search Benchmark Pipeline (corpus + harness + runner)
Search Habits Backend Schema (events + patterns + RLS)
Adaptive Search Backend Pipeline (event → pattern → suggestion)
DropBridge v2 Upload Claim + Wake + Auth Flow
Hybrid Retrieval via SemanticMatcher (vectorize + cosineSimilarity + rrfMerge)
DropBridge Upload Lifecycle (upload-file → list-pending → update-upload-status-v2)
DropBridge Device Registration + Auth Flow (register-device-v2, clientKind guard, push token)
MV3 Extension Entry Points (content scripts, background worker, side panel)
DropBridge Device Auth Flow: Migration Schema + Shared Auth Helper + Edge Functions
Slash Command i18n Surface: EN + ES locale files localizing the slash overlay UI
Release Test Pipeline: run-release-tests orchestrates node regressions including skin-themes test
DropBridge v2 schema evolution: two migrations incrementally extend devices+uploads tables
CI → npm test → test:release orchestration chain
Service worker loads supabase.js + background.js + reminders.js + extras as a unified runtime
